overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a coastal beach in a video game environment, starting on wet sand near the water, ascending a vegetated sandy dune, and continuing along a dirt trail at the top of the bluff while a helicopter passes overhead.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sand parallel to the ocean shoreline

entered.detail: calm ocean water along the shoreline
large rocky outcrop with steep sandy slopes
solitary tall pine tree atop the rocky headland
rock formations visible in the water offshore

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide coastal beach with overcast skies. The camera moves forward along wet sand parallel to the calm ocean water on the left. A prominent rocky headland with a tall pine tree dominates the right side of the frame, while distant rocks are visible offshore.

events.description: helicopter flies overhead from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking up the steep sandy slope of the coastal dune, leaving the shoreline behind

notable_agents.action: helicopter flying overhead from right to left across the sky

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends the sandy slope of the coastal dune, transitioning from the beach to higher ground. The ocean disappears from view behind as the rocky headland and pine tree grow larger and shift to the left. A helicopter briefly flies overhead from right to left.

agents.ego_description: walking along the dirt trail on top of the coastal bluff, surrounded by grass and scattered rocks

entered.detail: winding dirt path with patches of dry grass
dry grass covering the sloping terrain

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the bluff, the camera continues along a dirt trail surrounded by dry grassy hillsides and scattered rocks. The tall pine tree recedes into the distance on the left as the path winds forward through the open coastal terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a wide coastal beach under an overcast sky. It begins by gliding forward along the wet sand, moving parallel to the calm ocean water on the left. As the camera advances, a prominent rocky headland topped with a tall pine tree emerges to dominate the right side of the frame. The perspective then extends toward the horizon, revealing distant rocks scattered offshore as the journey along the shoreline continues.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends a coastal dune to reveal an expansive bluff overlooking the sea. It begins by climbing the sandy slope, causing the ocean to disappear from view as a rocky headland and a tall pine tree shift toward the left. As the camera reaches the crest, a helicopter briefly crosses the sky from right to left, marking the transition to higher ground. The scene then opens onto a winding dirt trail surrounded by dry grassy hillsides and scattered rocks. Finally, the path leads forward through the open coastal terrain while the pine tree recedes into the distance.
